---
title: "2026 public data file now available"
date: 2025-11-19
categories:
  - Scholarly metadata
  - Scholarly infrastructure
doi: https://doi.org/10.64000/7s70g-drz77
author: 
    - name: Martyn Rittman
    - name: Carlos del Ojo Elías
    - name: Luis Montilla
      orcid: 0000-0002-7079-6775
abstract: "Once a year we release all metadata records for content registered with Crossref in a public data file. This year’s version, containing nearly 180 million records, is now available. It includes metadata associated with all Crossref-registered DOIs in JSON-lines format."
---

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="60%"}

|Related items|
|:-:|
||
:::

::: {.column width="10%"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
{{< altmetrics type=large-donut details=true >}}
:::

::::
